comments.body: Why is this DO NOT MERGE?

> Why is this DO NOT MERGE?

just making sure I don't mess up :D, and the c/image vendoring looks like a downgrade if a commit is specified.
Yes, This should stay WIP, until we cut containers/image v4.0.0, which will hopefully happen today.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #1885) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
I think the latest PRs for containers/image 4.0 replace this one.  Reopen if I am mistaken.
